name: Rajib Sahoo
title: Senior Software Engineer
about: Senior Software Engineer with 12+ years building high-scale, event-driven distributed systems for global banks. Deep expertise in Java, Spring Boot, Kafka and cloud-native microservices on Kubernetes/OpenShift. Hands-on with LLM-powered and Agentic AI workflows: RAG pipelines, MCP-based tool integration, and JVM-native AI orchestration (Spring AI / LangChain4j). Focused on resilient, observable financial-services platforms delivered from design through production.

bullets: Architected an event-driven corporate lending platform covering the full credit lifecycle (contract orchestration, interest accrual, NPA provisioning, bill discounting) on Java 21, Spring Boot 3 and Kafka, deployed via Helm on OpenShift.
Processes ~1,000 transactions/day across 6 microservices; established API-First (GraphQL/REST) and design-pattern standards across the lending division.
Owned architecture and delivery of NG Trade Invoice Financing using scalable microservices and event-driven workflows (Spring Boot, Kafka, GraphQL/REST) for high-throughput transaction processing.
Built a 26-class validation framework (input/database/API validators, MapStruct) and drove resilience and API-consistency standards.
[EXAMPLE, replace with a real metric: cut release-validation defects by ~35% across 10+ services].
Built and maintained RESTful microservices using Java 8 and Spring Boot for an insurance-domain platform.
Implemented persistence with Spring Data JPA / Hibernate over Oracle, and wrote unit and integration tests with JUnit and Mockito.
Leveraged Java 8 streams, lambdas and the Collections framework to refactor legacy modules for readability and performance.
Developed enterprise Java web applications using Spring MVC, Hibernate and JSP/Servlets on Tomcat, delivered with Maven, for a telecommunications-domain system.
Designed and consumed REST APIs backed by DB2 with hand-tuned SQL.
Worked across the full SDLC (design, development, testing and production support), consistently delivering against tight release deadlines.

education.institution: Biju Patnaik University of Technology, Bhubaneswar

achievements: Past Vice President of Education, Standard Chartered Toastmasters Club
